rulings.Case Title: TONY K FONG VS. HUANZHI JIANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 15, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT HUANZHI JIANG's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Hearing Required. Mr. Fong and Ms. Jiang to be present. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TONY K FONG VS. HUANZHI JIANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues, Against Cross Complainant Huanzhi Jiang
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 15, 2016, line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT TONY FONG's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues, Against Cross Complainant Huanzhi Jiang Plaintiff's and Defendant's supplemental briefing is stricken. Supplemental briefing was allowed to address only those facts in the separate statement impacted by the order re: relief from admissions being deemed admitted. Plaintiff was not allowed to re-write the separate statement and not allowed to provide supplemental evidence as to the facts not impacted by the order. The ruling is based on the original briefing filed prior to March 14, 2016 hearing. Motion for Summary Judgment/Adjudication is DENIED. Moving party shifted its burden and opposing party's evidence showed triable issues of fact. Moving party addressed the late-filed opposition on the merits, did not indicate any prejudice, and did not articulate any grounds for objection to any particular evidence presented by the opposing party. Multiple triable issues of fact include, but are not limited to, facts 3, 14, 16, etc. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCISCO JOSE GALVEZ VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Re: Demurrer To Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Jarrod Y. Nakano In Support Thereof; And [Proposed] Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 15, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO GALVEZ's Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Re: Demurrer To Complaint DENIED. Judgment was entered on January 29, 2016. Additionally, moving party failed to sustain its burden under present "new law" within the meaning of CCP 1008. = (501/REQ)
